subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Feb. 1920
subcodes.first_line: Now is the time for thee to reveal that which lieth within thy heart, for until this hour no opportunity hath been vouchsafed Me to meet with thee and to attend to the sorrows of thy heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حالا وقت آنستکه آنچه در دل داری بگوئی زیرا تا بحال فرصتی حاصل نشده که بتوانم شما را ملاقات و بدرد های دلت برسم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
